description: Generic multi-agent team templates. Copy to a project root and customize member names only if your runtime uses different agent names.

teams.name: standard-delivery
teams.description: Default team for ordinary implementation work with planning, execution, review, and verification.

teams.name: project-inception
teams.description: Team for starting a new project by clarifying concept, boundaries, entities, workflows, risks, and orchestration mode before implementation.

teams.name: investigation-only
teams.description: Read-only team for understanding a codebase or diagnosing a problem without changing files.

teams.name: high-risk-change
teams.description: Team for changes involving APIs, data, security, infrastructure, or broad architectural impact.
